case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. TIRSA AZUCENA ZULETA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE:$75 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT, CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 4/2/08, $395.00 COSTS, $3,900.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,295.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST SERVED FEB-22-2008, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST SERVED FEB-22-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1400 LANE ST. S.F. CA. 94124, ** INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES, ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
